title: caruncularia aperta
intro: Caruncularia aperta is a plant species commonly referred to as the "horned poppy" due to its unique appearance, characterized by horn-like protrusions on its seed pods. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Caruncularia aperta include its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
